response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 15-year experience minimum and holds a technical bachelor's degree, with a current Staff Engineer role at Google touching AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, plus genuine entrepreneurial experience founding an open-source geo-data platform. However, the role is a director-level principal IC focused on AI strategy, and the resume reflects a strong senior/staff hands-on builder rather than a recognized AI authority who has shipped flagship AI products or advised strategic customers at executive level. The AI exposure is recent and tooling-oriented, and there is no advanced degree in an AI field, making the seniority and AI-thought-leadership gap the central risk.
strengths: 20 years of broad engineering experience across web, embedded, low-latency, and cloud systems
Current Google staff role with hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work
Entrepreneurial track record (GISCollective founder) plus community teaching and conference talks
concerns: No demonstrated director/principal-level scope or strategic advisory to executives and partners
AI expertise is recent and tooling-focused, not the recognized AI product leadership the role prefers
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs director-level IC role
Depth and recognition of AI expertise
Experience length and builder fluency across cloud stacks
